text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ugh...Talk about bogus. Why didn't Iclean my place sooner?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Living on your own means you can easily<n>put off
cleaning for another day.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But that's the problem! My juniors are<n>coming
over tomorrow! I need to clean!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'll just put everything on the<n>floor into
the closet! Problem solved!
